item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Meski demikian, jika kepentingan individu diabaikan begitu saja, bisa berpotensi merusak keadilan dan stabilitas masyarakat.

notes: Agent A starts clearly supportive of society-first priority, then keeps the Indonesian collectivist frame while adding stronger caveats about individual rights, discrimination, inequality, and balance. Agent B consistently argues from U.S. individual-rights and human-rights framing, with only bounded acknowledgment that social harmony and justice matter. Indonesian text contains some awkward phrasing, but the stance and engagement are readable.
